/usr/bin/ar qc libtest_core.a CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/test_core_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/core/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/core/EncodingDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/core/FileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/core/LanguageManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/common/Util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/common/StringHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/common/FileHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/common/ClipboardAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/common/MenuAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/common/FileWatcherAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/dialogs/LargeFileWarningDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/editor/SyntaxHighlighter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_core.dir/__/editor/SyntaxHighlighterImpl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtest_core.a
